title: Bloodline 32x
description: A high-performance, dark-themed PvP overhaul designed for aggressive playstyles and maximum frame rates.
body:
---
![Bloodline 32x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba664fbdac967e29c285bd383c819e0c165f8155.png)
---

> 🩸 Built for players who like their PvP clean, fast, and a little dark.

---

## ⚔️ Bloodline 32x

**Bloodline 32x** is a dark-themed PvP pack focused on **clarity, smooth gameplay, and a clean look**.  
It keeps things simple where it matters, while adding a strong visual style that actually feels different in-game.

Nothing overdone. Nothing distracting. Just a solid pack that works.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🗡️ **Short Swords**  
  Easy to aim with, less screen clutter, better for combos.

- 🌑 **Dark / Red Theme**  
  Clean mix of black and crimson tones without making things hard to see.

- 🔥 **Custom Details**  
  Armor, weapons, and small design touches that give the pack its own identity.

- 💡 **Subtle Glow Effects**  
  Important textures stand out without being too bright or messy.

- ⚡ **Good FPS**  
  32x but still lightweight — runs smooth in fights.

- 🎯 **Clean UI**  
  No unnecessary stuff, everything stays readable during PvP.

---

## 🧠 Why use this pack?

If you mainly play PvP, this pack just makes things easier.

- You can see players clearly  
- Your screen feels less crowded  
- Fights feel smoother overall  
- And it actually looks good while doing all that  

It’s made for **playing better**, not just looking cool.

---

## 🛠 Installation

1. Download the pack  
2. Put it in your **resourcepacks** folder  
3. Open Minecraft → **Settings → Resource Packs**  
4. Enable **Bloodline 32x**

---

## ⚙️ Info

| | |
| :-- | :-- |
| Resolution | 32x |
| Style | Dark / PvP |
| Use Case | PvP, Bedwars, Duels |
| Performance | Optimized |

## ❤️

If you like the pack, share it or use it in your videos — it helps a lot.

More updates coming.  Minimal UI, clear visuals, and reduced clutter to keep full focus on your enemies.

---

## 🧠 Why Choose Bloodline 32x?

Bloodline 32x is built for **serious PvP players** who want both **style and performance**.

- Track enemies more easily  
- Fight with clearer visuals and less clutter  
- Enjoy a unique dark aesthetic that stands out  
- Gain a competitive edge in every duel  

It’s not just a texture pack — it’s a **combat upgrade**.

---

## 🛠 Installation Guide

1. Download the **Bloodline 32x** `.zip` file  
2. Move it to your **Resource Packs folder**  
3. Open Minecraft → **Settings → Resource Packs**  
4. Activate **Bloodline 32x**  

---
